title: Tithymalus volgensis
taxonomy: Tithymalus volgensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It belongs to the genus Tithymalus, which is a group of euphorbiaceous plants. Tithymalus volgensis is further classified as a member of the order Malpighiales, which comprises a diverse group of flowering plants. Within the order Malpighiales, Tithymalus volgensis is placed in the family Euphorbiaceae, which includes plants such as the spurge and the poinsettia. Tithymalus volgensis is a specific species within the broader classification of Euphorbiaceae.
